title: Delhi court bans news reports linking Manoj Sandesara, family to Sterling Biotech bank fraud case
description: A Delhi court has imposed a ban on Google, Meta and unknown parties (including media houses) from publishing any content linking Manoj Kesari Chand Sandesara or his family members to the alleged Sterling Biotech bank fraud case. Senior Civil Judge Richa Chadha of the Tis Hazari Courts passed an ex parte interim injunction and ordered Google and Meta and John Doe defendants (unknown persons) to “de-index, de-list, and de-reference the URLs and content of articles flagged by Sandesara. “
